name: Spinach and Sun-Dried Tomato Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak sun-dried tomatoes in hot water for 30 minutes; drain.
2. Slice into thin strips.
3. Cook pasta according to package directions.
4. Sauté onions and garlic in oil over medium-low heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms, tamari, and black pepper; sauté another 3 minutes until vegetables are tender.
6. Add tomatoes, artichoke hearts, olives, and pine nuts; toss.
7. Add spinach; toss and heat through.
8. Toss with pasta; garnish with feta cheese.
